The Dragon Tree (Dracaena campestris) is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, known for its resinous sap and medicinal properties. The health benefits of Dracaena campestris include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as wound healing, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Dracaena campestris include draculin, a compound with anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as other triterpenoid saponins and polyphenolic compounds.
